programs.title: The Makery
programs.desc: After a scare from the Makery Tree, Nim sets to work making a spooky tree picture. She also bakes a pretzel spider web and creates a spooky top for one of the Crafty Kids.

programs.title: Play School: What's Cooking?
programs.desc: Time for dinner! Alex and Kaeng get a lesson in making roly poly rice paper rolls and yummy dipping sauce from legendary cook Nagi Maehashi. Alex, Kaeng and Nagi are joined by Nagi's best mate, Dozer, for a picnic dinner.

programs.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programs.desc: The Mayor of Wiggle Town: It's election day and The Wiggles need to vote for the new mayor of Wiggle Town. Who will make Wiggle Town Mayor? Plus, enjoy fun at the beach. (S8, ep 23).

programs.title: Thomas & Friends
programs.desc: Brenda learns it's important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programs.title: Tish Tash
programs.desc: Rosa and Tish have just arrived from the shops. Tish has brought a cuddly toy with her - a dragon.

programs.title: Tish Tash
programs.desc: Today Pola, Tish and Bobby are decorating a cake for Rosa. Tish suggests it should be a Fish Cake with a chocolate truffle as its eye.
